_comment: Frozen coverage floor (fleet T1 ratchet, Issue #277; payout #241 型). Shrink-only: coverage-ratchet.mjs fails CI if any metric drops below these values. Raise these numbers when coverage improves; never lower them. Regenerate the measurement with `npm run coverage`. 2026-07-21 (C4b runtime 昇格): re-baselined after replacing vault's self-made translate.ts core (lookup/interpolate/translate + its unit test) with nene2-i18n's shared createTranslator — the translation core now lives (and is tested) upstream, so functions/lines shift down; the vault-specific i18n shim (locale persistence + <html lang> sync) stays covered by i18n-context.test.tsx.
